title: lithocarpus densiflorus var. echinoides
intro: Lithocarpus densiflorus var. echinoides, also known as the coast live oak or scrub live oak, is a deciduous tree native to the Pacific coast of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Lithocarpus densiflorus var. echinoides include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support cardiovascular well-being. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential medicinal applications.
